title: Crunchy Beef Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe with crunchy beef and low-carb vegetables.

ingredients.name: Sliced beef (1 lb)
ingredients.notes: Slice the beef into thin strips

ingredients.name: Savory stir fry sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a low-carb stir fry sauce

ingredients.name: Crunchy vegetables (bell peppers, carrots)
ingredients.notes: Slice the vegetables into thin strips

ingredients.name: Coconut oil
ingredients.notes: Use a low-carb oil for cooking

ingredients.name: Green onions
ingredients.notes: Chop the green onions for garnish

ingredients.name: Salt and pepper
ingredients.notes: Season with salt and pepper to taste

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced vegetables to the skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Return the beef to the skillet and pour in the savory stir fry sauce.
Stir everything together and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
